shortDescription: Contemporary 1-bedroom apartment in Bayview Village with designer finishes and vibrant neighbourhood.
fullDescription: Welcome to 8 Rean Drive, Unit 615 in the vibrant Bayview Village neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. The sleeping quarters comprise 1 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
